description: A designed text-only share-card formatted like a newspaper/online-article header on a plain white background. A large bold black serif headline reads: 'Trump administration to get tough on companies that misuse the H-1B visa'. Below in a lighter sans-serif sub-headline: 'The Labor Department said it would start opening investigations into companies that take advantage of the H-1B visa program.' A grey timestamp line at the bottom reads: 'Updated September 23, 2025 at 6:07 p.m. EDT'. No photos or seals appear in the crop; the design is purely typographic, evoking a mainstream news outlet to borrow journalistic credibility. Messaging technique: frames a DOL enforcement initiative as authoritative news, emphasizing a tough-on-employers, protect-American-workers stance on H-1B visa abuse. Target audience: the administration's base and American workers receptive to immigration/visa enforcement.
notable_text: Trump administration to get tough on companies that misuse the H-1B visa; The Labor Department said it would start opening investigations into companies that take advantage of the H-1B visa program. Updated September 23, 2025 at 6:07 p.m. EDT
